name: leavanny
flavor_texts: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.
It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.
Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.
text: Leavanny is the Nurturing Pokémon. It is a bug and grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: swarm, chlorophyll, overcoat (hidden). Base stats — HP: 75, Attack: 103, Defense: 80, Sp. Atk: 70, Sp. Def: 80, Speed: 92. Evolution line: sewaddle → swadloon → leavanny. Lore: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk. It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle. Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.
